3255490.name: Fight Flight
3255490.description:
Fight Flight is a single-player arcade flight game focused on flying planes and chasing scores. You can jump straight into aerial combat or simply fly around the world at your own pace.

The game uses the real Earth as its map. Every session starts in a random real-world location with randomized weather. Sometimes you’ll be flying in clear skies, other times you’ll be dealing with rain and rough conditions.

There are two main ways to play:

  • Shoot Mode
    A fast-paced arcade mode where you fight CPU-controlled enemy planes. Take them down, build your score, and try to reach the top of the leaderboard.

  • Flight Mode
    A relaxed mode with no combat. Fly freely across the world and see how far you can go. Your total distance is tracked on a distance leaderboard.

Fight Flight keeps the controls simple and accessible. It’s not meant to be a hardcore simulator, but it still aims to feel like real flight, using real locations and changing weather to ground the experience.

If you enjoy arcade-style flying with a bit of realism mixed in, Fight Flight is your next flight!
